$statusLegend.ported: byte-equivalent to upstream (CI fails on drift)
$statusLegend.adapted: TypeScript port and/or namespace swap; logically equivalent
$statusLegend.extended: fork adds behavior on top of upstream
$statusLegend.added: file unique to the fork (no upstream)

files.notes: No upstream deprecation chain; empty array preserves the file shape across forks.
Upstream raw/input/block transforms preserved; added bidirectional core/code ↔ artisanpack/code + accepts artisanpack/paragraph.
TypeScript port; dropped @wordpress/compose `pipe` dependency in favor of direct composition.
Adapted to the visual-editor auto-discovery contract.

knownDivergences: utils.ts inlines the upstream `pipe` composition rather than depending on `@wordpress/compose.pipe`.
transforms.ts adds bidirectional block transforms with core/code.
